_comment: Mindflayer (FFT 'Squid' sprite, battle_ika_spr.bin). Tiers (Piscodaemon/Squidrakin/Mindflayer) = palettes 0/1/2. CONFIRMED in-editor, ordered dark->light by user-measured lightness: Hair & Skin=4,5,6 (41%..81%); Robe=7,8,9,10 (30%..54%); Robe Accent=11,12,13 (38%..75%). Outline (1), glint (2), and indices 3,14,15 left unthemed. shadeMode uniformHue.
